message.content: This section heading introduces a case study on XD Network (心动网络) as a representative mobile game enterprise. It is structured to answer retrieval queries regarding the company’s industry positioning, core business model, strategic initiatives, and competitive landscape within the mobile gaming sector. The provided text contains only the title; no specific dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, quantitative metrics, or evidence types are included. For detailed answers, retrieval should target the full case study content associated with this heading.
